mechanism_narrative: A persistently elevated federal funds rate raises the discount rate applied to future equity cash flows, compressing valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days as long as the rate stays above its trailing 12-month average.
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS at 4.33% reflects a restrictive policy stance relative to pre-2022 norms
failure_condition: Rank IC between FEDFUNDS level and forward 20d SPX returns is not negative and statistically significant (p<0.10) over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the unemployment rate of more than 0.3 percentage points over a 3-month window signals labor market deterioration that precedes earnings downgrades, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the following quarter.
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE currently at 4.2% near cycle lows
failure_condition: In periods when the 0.3pp UNRATE trigger fires, forward 60d SPX returns are positive in more than 55% of instances, or the mean triggered return is not significantly negative (p>0.10).

mechanism_narrative: Joint acceleration in retail sales and housing starts indicates simultaneous strength in consumer and residential investment demand, reinforcing expectations of robust GDP growth and lifting S&P 500 forward returns over the next month; neither series alone reliably predicts the move.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS at 724131 million and HOUST at 1324 thousand units in latest snapshot
failure_condition: The interaction term (RSAFS momentum x HOUST momentum) fails to add explanatory power over either univariate proxy alone, measured by no improvement in out-of-sample Rank IC exceeding 0.02.

mechanism_narrative: During late-cycle expansions, decelerating industrial production growth signals capacity constraints and margin compression that translate quickly into negative S&P 500 returns over the very short 5-day horizon as traders reprice earnings risk.
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO at 103.8799, near flat sequential growth
failure_condition: INDPRO deceleration shows no significant negative correlation with forward 5d SPX returns (|Rank IC| < 0.02) when GDPC1 growth is above 2% annualized, indicating the late-cycle conditioning is not informative.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained monthly growth in total nonfarm payrolls reflects broad economic expansion and consumer income growth, supporting corporate revenue and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the following quarter.
failure_condition: Positive 3-month PAYEMS growth is not associated with above-median forward 60d SPX returns over a rolling 5-year sample (t-test p>0.10).

mechanism_narrative: When headline CPI year-over-year growth exceeds a threshold consistent with above-target inflation, markets anticipate continued restrictive Fed policy, compressing equity multiples and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: When the CPI threshold is triggered, forward 20d SPX returns are not significantly negative (mean return not below zero at p<0.10) across triggered episodes.

mechanism_narrative: A joint slowdown in real GDP growth and retail sales signals an emerging demand-side recession risk; the combination amplifies negative sentiment beyond what either series predicts alone, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the following quarter, particularly when both decelerate concurrently.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 QoQ annualized growth < 1% AND RSAFS 3-month growth < 0%
evidence_refs: fact:GDPC1 at 23526.085 billion chained dollars, latest snapshot lagged 4 months
failure_condition: Joint trigger episodes show forward 60d SPX returns that are not significantly more negative than periods where only one condition holds (difference not significant at p<0.10).

mechanism_narrative: During a monetary tightening cycle, a simultaneous deceleration in industrial production combined with a high federal funds rate indicates supply-side stress compounded by tight credit conditions, causing sharp negative S&P 500 returns over the next week as markets reprice growth risk quickly.
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS at 4.33% with INDPRO near flat at 103.8799
failure_condition: Forward 5d SPX returns during joint-trigger episodes are not significantly more negative than during episodes with FEDFUNDS elevated but INDPRO rising (difference not significant at p<0.10).
